title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. pater-familias
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. pater-familias, also known as the Star-of-Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species in the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. pater-familias include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tinctures, infusions, and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
